title: satan #7854
definition:
1) adversary, one who withstands
    1a) adversary (in general - personal or national)
 2) superhuman adversary
    2a) Satan (as noun pr)
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) adversary, one who withstands
    1a) adversary (in general - personal or national)
 2) superhuman adversary
    2a) Satan (as noun pr)

    NASB:  adversary, also the name of the superhuman adversary of God
